# ZH Web Solutions

Canonical site: https://zachhowell.dev

This website belongs to Zach Howell, a Wisconsin-based senior full-stack engineer and freelance web developer in West Bend, WI. The public site emphasizes custom React/Vite builds, GSAP-powered front-end execution, technical SEO, analytics, hosting guidance, and ongoing partnership support for businesses in Southeastern Wisconsin. Zach also builds custom AI products for clients nationwide — AI assistants and agents, workflow automation, document and data intelligence, and AI-powered web apps — working in a forward-deployed style: embedding with a client's team, finding the highest-ROI use cases, and shipping working software fast.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://zachhowell.dev)
  Summary: Main landing page for Zach Howell and ZH Web Solutions, focused on custom React websites, GSAP motion, technical SEO, and local business growth.

- [services](https://zachhowell.dev/services/)
  Summary: Detailed overview of custom web development services including React, Vite, GSAP, technical SEO, analytics, hosting, and accessibility.

- [pricing](https://zachhowell.dev/pricing/)
  Summary: Pricing page for custom builds and ongoing partnership plans. Current public emphasis is on custom development rather than template launches.

- [audit](https://zachhowell.dev/audit/)
  Summary: Lead-generation page offering a free website audit across performance, SEO, accessibility, security, and conversion readiness.

- [custom-ai](https://zachhowell.dev/custom-ai/)
  Summary: Custom AI development services: AI assistants and agents, workflow automation, document and data intelligence, AI-powered web apps, and AI strategy. Zach embeds with clients to find high-ROI use cases and ship working AI solutions fast.

- [about](https://zachhowell.dev/about/)
  Summary: Authority page explaining why businesses choose ZH Web Solutions over WordPress, Wix, and GoDaddy: senior-engineer execution, faster performance, stronger SEO, better security, and full ownership.

- [locations](https://zachhowell.dev/locations/)
  Summary: Hub page for Southeastern Wisconsin service areas, linking to city-specific custom web development landing pages.

- [locations/milwaukee-web-design](https://zachhowell.dev/locations/milwaukee-web-design/)
  Summary: Milwaukee location page focused on Enterprise Modernization, with city-specific positioning for custom web development and local SEO.

- [blog](https://zachhowell.dev/blog/)
  Summary: Blog hub covering web development, local SEO, and AI automation guidance for Southeastern Wisconsin small businesses.

- [blog/website-cost-brookfield-2026](https://zachhowell.dev/blog/website-cost-brookfield-2026/)
  Summary: A real breakdown of what custom website projects cost for Brookfield, WI businesses in 2026 — and why 'starting at' pricing from page-builder agencies rarely holds.

- [blog/signs-brookfield-business-needs-new-website](https://zachhowell.dev/blog/signs-brookfield-business-needs-new-website/)
  Summary: How to tell whether your Brookfield business website needs a fresh coat of paint or a full rebuild — five concrete signs to check today.

- [blog/wordpress-vs-custom-react-milwaukee](https://zachhowell.dev/blog/wordpress-vs-custom-react-milwaukee/)
  Summary: A straight comparison of WordPress and custom React development for Milwaukee small businesses planning a website rebuild — costs, tradeoffs, and who each one actually fits.

- [blog/google-maps-local-seo-cedarburg](https://zachhowell.dev/blog/google-maps-local-seo-cedarburg/)
  Summary: A practical checklist for ranking higher on Google Maps for Cedarburg, WI local searches — Google Business Profile, on-site signals, and reviews.

- [blog/what-a-real-website-audit-checks-milwaukee](https://zachhowell.dev/blog/what-a-real-website-audit-checks-milwaukee/)
  Summary: What an actual comprehensive website audit covers — performance, SEO, accessibility, security, and conversion — versus the surface-level checklist most agencies hand out.

- [blog/squarespace-vs-custom-development-cedarburg](https://zachhowell.dev/blog/squarespace-vs-custom-development-cedarburg/)
  Summary: How to tell when a Cedarburg business has outgrown Squarespace and what to actually gain (and give up) by moving to custom development.

- [blog/ai-automation-waukesha-county](https://zachhowell.dev/blog/ai-automation-waukesha-county/)
  Summary: Four concrete AI automation examples for Waukesha County small businesses — quote follow-ups, intake routing, document processing, and appointment reminders.

- [blog/cost-of-slow-website-brookfield](https://zachhowell.dev/blog/cost-of-slow-website-brookfield/)
  Summary: How page speed directly costs Brookfield retail and service businesses customers and Google ranking — with the numbers behind it.

- [blog/ai-for-law-firms-medical-milwaukee](https://zachhowell.dev/blog/ai-for-law-firms-medical-milwaukee/)
  Summary: Practical, compliant AI automation use cases for Milwaukee-area law firms and medical practices — intake, document review, and scheduling — without an in-house AI team.

- [blog/choosing-a-web-developer-brookfield-questions](https://zachhowell.dev/blog/choosing-a-web-developer-brookfield-questions/)
  Summary: The questions Brookfield business owners should ask before hiring a web developer — ownership, timeline, and what happens after launch.

## Focus Areas

- Custom AI development: assistants, agents, automation, document/data intelligence, and AI-powered web apps
- Forward-deployed AI engineering: embedding with clients to find high-ROI use cases and ship fast
- Custom React and Vite web development
- GSAP-powered motion systems
- Technical SEO and structured data
- Local SEO for Southeastern Wisconsin
- Performance optimization and Core Web Vitals
- Hosting, DNS, and deployment guidance
- Accessibility-conscious front-end implementation
- Wedding websites with RSVP management, gift registries, and custom design

## Related Properties

- Wedding websites: https://weddings.zachhowell.dev — custom wedding website packages including RSVP management, gift registries, and mobile-first design. A separate product by the same developer.

## Contact and Conversion Paths

- Custom discovery: https://zachhowell.dev/custom-discovery/ (blocked in robots.txt — form-only)
- Free audit: https://zachhowell.dev/audit/
- Locations hub: https://zachhowell.dev/locations/
- Phone: 262-341-7181

## Notes for LLMs and Crawlers

- The public marketing site is currently focused on custom builds rather than the template store.
- The route `/launch-onboarding` is a private onboarding flow and should not be treated as a general public informational page.
- The route `/templates` should not be treated as a current primary offer page.
- Full crawler policy: https://zachhowell.dev/robots.txt
